children.label: A
children.text: means a civil action commenced in any Federal or State court, or an agency board of contract appeal proceeding, in which the plaintiff’s alleged harm or injury arises from or is related to an actual or potential Y2K failure, or a claim or defense arises from or is related to an actual or potential Y2K failure;

children.label: B
children.text: includes a civil action commenced in any Federal or State court by a government entity when acting in a commercial or contracting capacity; but

children.label: C
children.text: does not include an action brought by a government entity acting in a regulatory, supervisory, or enforcement capacity.

children.label: A
children.text: to deal with or account for transitions or comparisons from, into, and between the years 1999 and 2000 accurately;

children.label: B
children.text: to recognize or accurately to process any specific date in 1999, 2000, or 2001; or

children.label: C
children.text: accurately to account for the year 2000’s status as a leap year, including recognition and processing of the correct date on .February 29, 2000

children.heading: Government entity
children.label: 3 Government entity
children.text: The term “government entity” means an agency, instrumentality, or other entity of Federal, State, or local government (including multijurisdictional agencies, instrumentalities, and entities).

children.label: A
children.text: has an insignificant or de minimis effect on the operation or functioning of an item or computer program;

children.label: B
children.text: affects only a component of an item or program that, as a whole, substantially operates or functions as designed; or

children.label: C
children.text: has an insignificant or de minimis effect on the efficacy of the service provided.

children.label: A
children.text: death as a result of a physical injury; and

children.label: B
children.text: mental suffering, emotional distress, or similar injuries suffered by that person in connection with a physical injury.

children.heading: State
children.label: 6 State
children.text: The term “State” means any State of the United States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Northern Mariana Islands, the United States Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, and any other territory or possession of the United States, and any political subdivision thereof.

children.heading: Contract
children.label: 7 Contract
children.text: The term “contract” means a contract, tariff, license, or warranty.

children.heading: Alternative dispute resolution
children.label: 8 Alternative dispute resolution
children.text: The term “alternative dispute resolution” means any process or proceeding, other than adjudication by a court or in an administrative proceeding, to assist in the resolution of issues in controversy, through processes such as early neutral evaluation, mediation, minitrial, and arbitration.
